goal: theorem add_comm x y = x + y = y + x
theorem add_assoc x y z = (x + y) + z = x + (y + z)
theorem mul_comm x y = x * y = y * x
theorem mul_assoc x y z = (x * y) * z = x * (y * z)
theorem distrib x y z = x * (y + z) = x * y + x * z
theorem add_zero x = x + 0 = x
theorem mul_one x = x * 1 = x
theorem mul_zero x = x * 0 = 0
theorem abs_nonneg x = abs x >= 0
theorem abs_triangle x y = abs (x + y) <= abs x + abs y
theorem max_comm x y = max x y = max y x
theorem min_comm x y = min x y = min y x
theorem max_assoc x y z = max x (max y z) = max (max x y) z
theorem min_max_absorb x y = min x (max x y) = x
theorem div_mod_id a b = b > 0 ==> a = b * (a / b) + (a mod b)
theorem append_nil l = l @ [] = l
theorem append_assoc l1 l2 l3 = (l1 @ l2) @ l3 = l1 @ (l2 @ l3)
theorem length_append l1 l2 = List.length (l1 @ l2) = List.length l1 + List.length l2
theorem rev_rev l = List.rev (List.rev l) = l
theorem map_id l = List.map (fun x -> x) l = l
theorem map_compose f g l = List.map f (List.map g l) = List.map (fun x -> f (g x)) l
theorem length_map f l = List.length (List.map f l) = List.length l
theorem length_rev l = List.length (List.rev l) = List.length l
theorem mem_append x l1 l2 = List.mem x (l1 @ l2) = (List.mem x l1 || List.mem x l2)
theorem filter_append p l1 l2 = List.filter p (l1 @ l2) = List.filter p l1 @ List.filter p l2
theorem flat_map_assoc f g l = List.concat_map g (List.concat_map f l) = List.concat_map (fun x -> List.concat_map g (f x)) l
theorem nth_map f l i = i < List.length l ==> List.nth (List.map f l) i = f (List.nth l i)
theorem for_all_append p l1 l2 = List.for_all p (l1 @ l2) = (List.for_all p l1 && List.for_all p l2)
theorem sorted_insert x l = sorted l ==> sorted (insert x l)
theorem sorted_sort l = sorted (sort l)
theorem perm_sort l = is_perm l (sort l)
theorem bsearch_correct a v = sorted a ==> (match bsearch a v with Some i -> a.(i) = v | None -> not (Array.exists (fun x -> x = v) a))
theorem stack_push_pop x s = pop (push x s) = (x, s)
theorem queue_fifo x q = not (is_empty q) ==> fst (dequeue (enqueue x q)) = front q
theorem rbt_invariant x t = is_rbt t ==> is_rbt (rbt_insert x t)
theorem bst_invariant x t = is_bst t ==> is_bst (bst_insert x t)
theorem heap_insert_min x h = is_heap h ==> find_min (heap_insert x h) <= x
theorem margin_nonneg acct = valid_account acct ==> margin_requirement acct >= 0.0
theorem order_fill_balance order book = valid_order order ==> balance_after (fill order book) >= 0.0
theorem matching_symmetric buy sell = can_match buy sell ==> can_match sell buy
theorem settlement_complete trades = all_valid trades ==> is_settled (settle trades)
theorem risk_monotone p1 p2 = portfolio_subset p1 p2 ==> risk p1 <= risk p2

tactic_proof: CX: l = [1; 3; 2] -- List.rev [1;3;2] = [2;3;1] which is not sorted
goal: verify (fun l -> sorted l ==> sorted (List.rev l))
verify (fun l1 l2 -> l1 @ l2 = l2 @ l1)
verify (fun f l1 l2 -> List.map f l1 = List.map f l2 ==> l1 = l2)
verify (fun l -> sort (sort l) = sort l)
verify (fun p l -> List.length (List.filter p l) <= List.length l)
verify (fun s -> subset s s)
verify (fun x y -> x > 0 && y > 0 ==> x / y >= 0)

tactic_proof: CX: x = max_int -- overflow wraps to min_int
goal: verify (fun (x:int) -> x + 1 > x)

tactic_proof: CX: a=1e30, b= -1e30, c=1.0 -- floating point not associative
goal: verify (fun (a:float) b c -> (a +. b) +. c = a +. (b +. c))
theorem bst_insert_preserves x t = is_bst t ==> is_bst (bst_insert x t)
theorem bst_member_after_insert x t = bst_member x (bst_insert x t)
theorem tree_mirror_involutive t = mirror (mirror t) = t
theorem tree_size_positive t = tree_size t >= 0
theorem tree_flatten_length t = List.length (flatten t) = tree_size t
theorem heap_extract_min_sorted h = is_heap h ==> sorted (heapsort h)
theorem avl_balanced t = is_avl t ==> abs (height (left t) - height (right t)) <= 1
theorem rbt_black_height t = is_rbt t ==> black_height (left t) = black_height (right t)
theorem abs_diff_symmetric x y = abs (x - y) = abs (y - x)
theorem sqr_nonneg x = x * x >= 0
theorem ge_trans x y z = x >= y ==> y >= z ==> x >= z
theorem eq_refl_trans x y = x = y ==> y = x
theorem neg_neg x = -(-x) = x
theorem sub_self_zero x = x - x = 0
theorem mul_distrib_sub x y z = x * (y - z) = x*y - x*z
theorem pow_zero x = x > 0 ==> x ** 0 = 1
theorem pow_succ x n = n >= 0 ==> x ** (n+1) = x * (x ** n)
theorem gcd_self n = n >= 0 ==> gcd n n = n
theorem gcd_zero n = n >= 0 ==> gcd n 0 = n
theorem divides_refl n = n <> 0 ==> divides n n
theorem record_set_get r v = (set_field r v).field = v
theorem record_get_set_idempotent r = set_field r (r.field) = r
theorem record_set_comm r v1 v2 = set_f2 (set_f1 r v1) v2 = set_f1 (set_f2 r v2) v1
theorem record_eq_fields r1 r2 = r1.a = r2.a ==> r1.b = r2.b ==> r1 = r2
theorem option_some_inj x y = Some x = Some y ==> x = y
theorem option_none_not_some x = None <> Some x
theorem tuple_fst_snd p = (fst p, snd p) = p
theorem fsm_deterministic s e = forall s1 s2. transition s e s1 ==> transition s e s2 ==> s1 = s2
theorem fsm_reachable_trans s1 s2 s3 = reachable s1 s2 ==> reachable s2 s3 ==> reachable s1 s3
theorem fsm_initial_reachable s = s = initial_state ==> reachable s s
theorem fsm_no_deadlock s = reachable initial_state s ==> exists e s'. transition s e s'
theorem fsm_invariant_preserve s e s' = inv s ==> transition s e s' ==> inv s'
theorem safety_property s = reachable initial_state s ==> not (is_error s)
theorem liveness_property s = reachable initial_state s ==> eventually goal_state s
theorem hash_deterministic m1 m2 = m1 = m2 ==> hash m1 = hash m2
theorem signature_verify sk pk m = keypair sk pk ==> verify pk m (sign sk m) = true
theorem encrypt_decrypt k m = decrypt k (encrypt k m) = m
theorem merkle_root_unique l1 l2 = merkle_root l1 = merkle_root l2 ==> l1 = l2
theorem xor_involutive x y = xor (xor x y) y = x
theorem nonce_unique n1 n2 = generate_nonce n1 = generate_nonce n2 ==> n1 = n2
theorem block_prev_chain b = valid_chain b ==> prev_hash (head b) = hash (tail b)
theorem tx_balance_conservation tx = valid_tx tx ==> sum_inputs tx = sum_outputs tx + fee tx
theorem utxo_no_double_spend tx1 tx2 utxo = valid_tx tx1 ==> valid_tx tx2 ==> disjoint (inputs tx1) (inputs tx2)
theorem consensus_majority votes = count_yes votes > length votes / 2 ==> accepted votes
theorem longest_chain c1 c2 = valid_chain c1 ==> valid_chain c2 ==> height c1 >= height c2 ==> canonical c1
theorem group_identity_unique e1 e2 = is_identity e1 ==> is_identity e2 ==> e1 = e2
theorem group_inverse_unique a b c = op a b = identity ==> op a c = identity ==> b = c
theorem monoid_left_id a = op identity a = a
theorem monoid_right_id a = op a identity = a
theorem ring_distrib a b c = mul a (add b c) = add (mul a b) (mul a c)
theorem ring_zero_mul a = mul zero a = zero
theorem semilat_idempotent a = meet a a = a
theorem mutex_exclusive s = acquired s ==> not (available s)
theorem lock_release s = acquire (release (acquire s)) = acquire s
theorem queue_ordering q msgs = push q msgs ==> fifo_order (drain q)
theorem actor_isolation a b m = send a b m ==> state a = state a
theorem atomic_read_write x v = read (write x v) = v
theorem cas_success x old new = read x = old ==> cas x old new = (true, write x new)
theorem deadlock_free tree = acyclic tree ==> not (deadlocked tree)
theorem acid_atomicity tx db = commit tx db = Some db' \/ commit tx db = None
theorem rollback_inverse tx db = rollback tx (apply tx db) = db
theorem isolation_serializable t1 t2 db = serializable [t1; t2] db = serializable [t2; t1] db
theorem index_consistent idx tbl = valid_index idx tbl ==> forall k. lookup idx k = table_lookup tbl k
theorem foreign_key p c = valid_db (p, c) ==> forall r in c. exists parent in p. fk_match r parent
theorem normalization_bcnf r = bcnf r ==> third_nf r
theorem tcp_in_order conn pkts = established conn ==> tcp_deliver conn pkts = sort_by_seq pkts
theorem packet_checksum p = valid_packet p ==> verify_checksum p = true
theorem routing_loop_free graph = valid_routing graph ==> acyclic (next_hop graph)
theorem tls_handshake_secrecy c s = secure_handshake c s ==> secret_key_safe c s
theorem retry_idempotent req = idempotent req ==> retry req = send req
theorem auth_token_valid t = verify_token t = Some user ==> user = decode t
theorem rbac_permission u r p = has_role u r && role_has_perm r p ==> authorized u p
theorem password_hash_oneway p1 p2 = hash_pw p1 = hash_pw p2 ==> p1 = p2 \/ collision p1 p2
theorem input_sanitize s = safe (sanitize s)
theorem session_expiry s t = expired s t ==> not (valid_session s t)
theorem audit_log_append log e = append log e = log ++ [e]
theorem gd_converge f lr x0 = convex f ==> lr > 0 ==> lr <= 1 / lipschitz f ==> converges (gd f lr x0)
theorem softmax_sum_one xs = List.length xs > 0 ==> List.fold_left (+.) 0.0 (softmax xs) = 1.0
theorem relu_nonneg x = relu x >= 0.0
theorem sigmoid_bounded x = 0.0 <= sigmoid x && sigmoid x <= 1.0
theorem loss_nonneg y y_hat = mse y y_hat >= 0.0
theorem backprop_chain f g x = gradient (compose f g) x = gradient f (g x) *. gradient g x
